LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS CHARLES BREIDINGER AND JOHN BREIDINGER'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES (C.C.P. 430.30) IS OVERRULED AS TO NEGLIGENCE, NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT AND CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BREACH OF CONTRACT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR # 5220 301/REQ

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CHARLES BREIDINGER, JOHN BREIDINGER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED. THERE IS NO BASIS TO DISTURB THE PRIOR DECISION OVERRULING THE DEMURRER TO ALL BUT THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE AMENDED FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOW SUFFICIENT TO STATE A CLAIM. THERE IS NO BASIS FOR PARAGRAPH 30, ESPECIALLY GIVEN THE LACK OF A REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO PLAINTIFF LONG, MICHAEL TURNER, MATTHEW DUTCHER, JOELLEN WAXDECK, BRETT

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Westley, Esq., 415-362-2817 for plaintiff and opposing party Michael Long

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CHARLES BREIDINGER, JOHN BREIDINGER'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Demurrer overruled as to all causes of action. Motion to strike granted. There is no basis to disturb the prior decision overruling the demurrer to all but the fifth cause of action. The amended fifth cause of action is now sufficient to state a claim. There is no basis for paragraph 30, especially given the lack of a request for punitive damages. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 (301/HEK)

SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BREACH OF CONTRACT. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR # 5220 =301/REQ
